title: Neonesomia palmeri

The plant is classified as a member of the genus Neonesomia, which is part of the larger family Boraginaceae. This classification is based on the plant's physical characteristics and genetic relationships with other species. Neonesomia palmeri is further classified into the species level due to its unique morphological features and distinct genetic markers.
